In this chapter:

(2) “Department” and “licensing authority” mean the Department of Public Safety.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 703. Nonresident Violator Compact of 1977
##### § 703.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Citation” and “motorist” have the meanings assigned by Article II, Section (b), Nonresident Violator Compact of 1977.

    (2) “Department” and “licensing authority” mean the Department of Public Safety.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: “Citation” and “motorist” have the meanings assigned by Article II, Section (b), Nonresident Violator Compact of 1977.
“Department” and “licensing authority” mean the Department of Public Safety.
